hero.title: TanaVinto Luxury Villas
hero.subtitle: Experience a premium villa stay in the heart of Karjat surrounded by nature, private pool vibes, cozy interiors, and unforgettable moments.

prideSection.title: Where Luxury Meets Nature
prideSection.subtitle: Nestled amidst the serene beauty of Karjat, TanaVinto Villas offers a perfect blend of comfort, privacy, and luxury. Designed for weekend getaways, celebrations, and peaceful escapes, every corner of the villa is crafted to create unforgettable experiences.

items.title: Celebrations & Parties
items.subtitle: Perfect destination for birthdays, bachelor parties, group stays, and memorable nights.

footer.description: Experience the pinnacle of luxury, heritage, and unparalleled service. Taj Hotels resorts and palaces span the globe, offering an authentic and world-class hospitality experience.
